Judge Pro Tem: Ora Prochovnik, Clerk: A. Mok, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Swords to Plowshare, A California Nonprofit Corporation is present. Represented by Ian O'Leary.
Attorney Michael Sherwood Rossoff for the plaintiff.
Defendants Glenn Evans AKA Glen Evans is present.
Attorney Samuel Cartensen appearing for defendant in full scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of Dec 21, 2015 is vacated. (501/jpt)
